hero.subtitle: Henrique Jorge de Queiroz
hero.bio: 15-year-old Full-Stack Developer from Santos, Brazil. I build AI-powered solutions, automate what can be automated, and ship products that actually work.

vip.company: VIP Administradora de Bens e Condomínios
vip.description: Built the professional Landing Page for VIP, a property management company. Used React + TypeScript + ShadCN UI, and handled full deployment via cPanel including domain configuration.

frilic.description: Built an automated WhatsApp Chatbot for a medical clinic as one of 3 developers. I owned the backend — the chatbot itself — using Node.js + TypeScript with whatsapp-web.js, node-notifier, and qrcode-terminal. The bot automated scheduling, viewing, and cancellation, cutting costs and improving service.

pompeia.description: Built a Landing Page and WhatsApp Chatbot for a beauty salon. The Landing Page used Next.js + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS in a monorepo setup. The chatbot was an improved version of a previous project — added caching, push notifications via NTFY, and mobile alerts.

vem.company: Vem com a Gente - Agência de Viagens
vem.description: Built an automated WhatsApp Chatbot for a travel agency using Node.js with whatsapp-web.js, node-notifier, and qrcode-terminal. The bot automated support and sales, fully customizable per client needs.
vem.testimonial: I really want to thank you for the work you did. The bot turned out great, did exactly what I needed without any hassle. I saw how dedicated you were, testing everything, fixing bugs, and even pulling all-nighters to finish. It turned out really well and sped up my client service a lot. If anyone asks, I'll recommend you without thinking twice!

notorium.name: Notorium (SaaS)
notorium.headline: Your Instagram on autopilot.
notorium.description: An AI-powered content automation platform for social media — built to plan, generate, and publish posts consistently. Although the project was discontinued, the complete system was built end-to-end (product, integrations, and infrastructure).

queirozzfm.name: queirozz.fm
queirozzfm.headline: A Spotify-inspired UI built from scratch.
queirozzfm.description: A UI/UX-focused project: a Spotify-inspired adaptation built from the ground up with careful layout, state handling, and responsive behavior.

items.title: Precision over speed
items.description: I care more about building the right thing correctly than shipping fast and breaking it. Every decision is intentional.

items.title: Full ownership
items.description: I don't just write code. I think about the product, the UX, the deployment, the domain. I take the whole thing seriously.

items.title: Communication first
items.description: I keep clients informed. No ghosting, no surprises. Clear expectations, honest updates.

items.title: Continuous improvement
items.description: Every project I ship is better than the last. I revisit, refactor, and learn from what I build.
